doc_title: On Prompt-Driven Safeguarding for Large Language Models

items.evidence_span: While the capabilities of large language models (LLMs) keep growing (OpenAI, 2023)
the recently proposed persuasive adversarial prompts (Zeng et al. 2024)
For each model, we use the corresponding input template (Zheng, 2023) to transform the safety prompt (if used) and queries into input sequences.
It takes the setting of the prompt tuning paradigm (Lester et al. 2021),
